requirement_title: Malformed email without @ is still submitted
title: State transition path 1 (ALL_TRANSITIONS)
expected_result: The submitted email is sent to the authentication API without format validation.

requirement_title: Malformed email without @ is still submitted
title: EP: Malformed email without @ accepted and submitted to API
precondition: Login form is loaded and lacks client-side email format validation
test_steps:
Enter a malformed email (e.g., 'no-at-sign') in the email field
Enter any password
Click the submit button
expected_result: The form submits without error, and the malformed email 'no-at-sign' is sent to the API

requirement_title: Malformed email without @ is still submitted
title: DT: User submits malformed email reaches API with no validation
precondition: Login form has no email format validator
test_steps:
Submit the login form with email field containing a string without '@' (e.g., 'missing-at')
Observe that the request is sent to the API
expected_result: The email 'missing-at' is included in the API request
